form.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd on April 9 over 515m at this track behind Paw Damon beaten 8 lengths (30.03) in a Grade 5. Thereabouts of late and rates highly this line-up. Expected to be in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 3rd on April 9 over 515m at this track behind Paw Damon beaten 8 lengths (30.03) in a Grade 5. Thereabouts of late and rates highly this line-up. Expected to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Most recent effort finished last over 460m at Warragul beaten 9 lengths (26.60) behind Mighty Scar in a Grade 4/5 on April 7. On best form is more than capable. Keep safe.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Most recent effort finished last over 460m at Warragul beaten 9 lengths (26.60) behind Mighty Scar in a Grade 4/5 on April 7. On best form is more than capable. Keep safe.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a strong early split and led throughout to score an impressive win by 2.75 lengths over 515m at this track (29.99). Can measure up again with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a strong early split and led throughout to score an impressive win by 2.75 lengths over 515m at this track (29.99). Can measure up again with the right run.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage eighth last time out over 435m at Sale. Likely to struggle this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage eighth last time out over 435m at Sale. Likely to struggle this time.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by a long neck at The Meadows over 525m (30.57) beating Riversdale Mick in Free For All on March 25. Looks the one to beat again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to win by a long neck at The Meadows over 525m (30.57) beating Riversdale Mick in Free For All on March 25. Looks the one to beat again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Crossed to inside soon after start.

form.formComment: Finished third last start (30.57) at big odds over 525m at The Meadows. Has to do a bit more.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished third last start (30.57) at big odds over 525m at The Meadows. Has to do a bit more.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Went up with lids and slow to begin.

form.formComment: In the money last time at The Meadows (30.27) in a Grade 5, finishing a half a length second. Has performed well off the draw with a win and four places from six starts. Suited here and expected to run well.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th over 600m at The Meadows beaten 5.5 lengths (35.02) behind Point Break in a Restricted WIN H on April 8. Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.
